content:
🚀 unbrowse | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable AI agents to interact with websites by automatically reverse-engineering and creating reusable API interfaces, making web automation faster, cheaper, and more efficient.
✨ Key Features: • Local MCP server and CLI • Auto-discovery of APIs from browser traffic • Generates reusable API interfaces (skills) on the fly
📖 Summary: Unbrowse is a local Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and CLI that transforms websites into reusable API interfaces for agents. It captures network traffic, reverse-engineers API endpoints, and stores learned information in a marketplace for instant reuse, significantly improving agent efficiency and reducing costs.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 taskt | C#
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating repetitive, rule-based tasks across desktop and web applications without requiring deep programming knowledge.
✨ Key Features: • Free and open-source RPA client • Built in C#/.NET Framework • No-code bot design with visual designer • Element recorder and screen recorder • Automation for web and desktop applications
📖 Summary: taskt is a free and open-source Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tool built with C# and the .NET Framework. It allows users to design and build automation scripts without extensive coding, featuring a visual bot designer, element recorder, and screen recorder.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ bluehood | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To monitor, analyze, and visualize local Bluetooth device activity for educational purposes, raising awareness about Bluetooth privacy and potential metadata leakage.
✨ Key Features: • Continuous scanning for BLE and Classic Bluetooth devices • Device identification by vendor and BLE service UUIDs • Device classification into categories (phones, audio, vehicles, etc.) • Tracking presence patterns with hourly/daily heatmaps
📖 Summary: Bluehood is a Python-based project that monitors and analyzes Bluetooth activity in a local neighborhood. It identifies and classifies nearby Bluetooth devices, tracks their presence patterns over time, and provides a web dashboard for visualization and analysis, aiming to raise awareness about Bluetooth privacy risks.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 scientific-agent-skills | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To empower AI agents with specialized capabilities to execute complex scientific research and analysis tasks across multiple disciplines.
✨ Key Features: • 138 ready-to-use scientific and research skills • Supports the open Agent Skills standard for broad compatibility
📖 Summary: Scientific Agent Skills provides a comprehensive collection of 138 pre-built skills for AI agents, enabling them to perform complex scientific and research workflows across various domains like bioinformatics, drug discovery, and materials science. These skills adhere to the open Agent Skills standard, ensuring broad compatibility with different AI agent frameworks.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ sub2api | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To act as a unified gateway for accessing and managing multiple AI service subscriptions, enabling efficient quota distribution, cost-sharing, and streamlined API key management for users.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-Account Management • API Key Distribution • Precise Billing (Token-level) • Smart Scheduling (Sticky Sessions) • Concurrency Control
📖 Summary: Sub2API is an open-source AI API gateway platform that centralizes access to various AI services like Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini. It allows users to share subscription quotas, manage API keys, and handle authentication, billing, and request forwarding, making AI service access more efficient and cost-effective.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 superset | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable developers to run and manage multiple AI coding agents simultaneously on their local machine, streamlining parallel development workflows and improving coding efficiency.
✨ Key Features: • Parallel execution of multiple AI coding agents • Worktree isolation for each agent task • Agent monitoring and notification system
📖 Summary: Superset is a desktop application designed to orchestrate and manage multiple AI coding agents, such as Claude Code and Codex, in parallel. It provides a unified interface for running these agents on local development tasks, isolating each agent's work in separate git worktrees for better organization and preventing interference.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
